subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived and its contents were noted. Praise thou God that in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و مضامین معلوم گردید حمد کن خدا را که در سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
